hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*(gh-pages|origin gh)'; then cd /home/user/guitar && branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = 'gh-pages' ]; then if ! diff -q guitar-improv.html index.html > /dev/null 2>&1; then cp guitar-improv.html index.html && git add index.html && git commit -m 'Auto-sync index.html from guitar-improv.html' && git push origin gh-pages && echo '{"systemMessage": "✓ index.html sincronizzato automaticamente con guitar-improv.html"}'; fi; fi; fi
